title: DN31 2TG, Seachill UK Limited: environmental permit issued - EPR/JP3830WG/V006
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:   Operator name: Seachill UK Limited Installation name: Estate Road 2 Fish Processing Site Permit number: EPR/JP3830WG/V006  "
